<!--
Thanks for contributing to AISMM. Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before opening
this PR. Substantive changes should reference an accepted change-request issue.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue / discussion

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, or "accepted in principle in #123" -->

## Change classification

<!-- Pick one — see aismm-versioning-and-conformance.md -->

- [ ] **Editorial** (typos, formatting, link fixes — no version impact)
- [ ] **Additive** (new optional fields, new layers, examples — MINOR bump)
- [ ] **Breaking** (removing/renaming, changed required/optional, semantic change — MAJOR bump)

## Affected layers / files

<!-- Use full layer IDs: b4.405, b10.1004 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (Added / Changed / Deprecated / Removed / Fixed / Security)
- [ ] `aismm-layer-inventory.md` updated if layers were added/removed or README/schema coverage changed
- [ ] Corresponding `bN.schema.json` updated if a layer spec changed (no schema/spec drift)
- [ ] Example added/updated in `examples/` if the change is user-facing
- [ ] Cross-references and links checked (no dead links)
- [ ] Local checks pass (markdown lint, link check, schema validation — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
